languages.text: "Да благословит {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссия{/g} Лорда-капитана за аудиенцию согласованную! Тех-процессия прибыла сюда с песнопением благодарности, так воспоем же заботу Лорда-капитана об отвергнувших плоть во имя службы Машинному духу! Голоса железа вознесут хвалу вашему благочестию по всем палубам корабля. Позвольте перейти на священную {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}техно-лингву{/g}, что передаст наше восхищение точнее ограниченных слов". {n}Бинарные трели оглашают палубу, встраиваясь в гудение {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитаторов{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Да благословит {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссия{/g} Лорда-капитана за аудиенцию согласованную! Тех-процессия прибыла сюда с песнопением благодарности, так воспоем же заботу Лорда-капитана об отвергнувших плоть во имя службы Машинному духу! Голоса железа вознесут хвалу вашему благочестию по всем палубам корабля. Позвольте перейти на священную {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}техно-лингву{/g}, что передаст наше восхищение точнее ограниченных слов". {n}Бинарные трели оглашают палубу, встраиваясь в гудение {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитаторов{/g}.{/n}
traits.speaker: EngineMaster

languages.text: "May the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} bless the Lord Captain for this sanctioned audience! This tech-procession has come reciting the canticles of gratitude. Let us sing of the Lord Captain's concern for those who have forsaken their flesh in the service of the machine spirit! The voices of metal will sing the praises of your piety throughout the decks of the ship. Give us leave to switch to the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Techna-Lingua{/g}, which will convey our admiration more accurately than limited words." {n}Binharic trills ring out across the deck, melding with the hum of the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Да благословит {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссия{/g} Лорда-капитана за аудиенцию согласованную! "May the Omnissiah bless the Lord Captain for this audience under Protocol 32/3! The Sacred Tech-Procession has come here reciting chant of gratitude 200-Alpha. We will sing of the Sector Bionica's concern for those who have forsaken the flesh in the service of the ship's Machine Spirit. The voices of our augments will sing the praises of your piety throughout the decks of the ship. Give us leave to switch to the sacred Techna-Lingua, which will convey our admiration more accurately than limited words." {n}Binharic trills ring out across the deck, melding with the hum of the cogitators.{/n}

languages.text: 「全知なる神が、この32/3条項による謁見に際し、艦長に祝福を！聖なるテクノロジーの行列が感謝のchants 200-Alphaを唱えながらここに至りました。我々は、機械霊の奉仕のために肉体を捨てた者たちへのセクター・ビオニカの思いを歌います。我々の増幅された声は、艦の各デッキにあなたの信仰の賛歌を響かせます。我々を聖なるテクナ・リンガに切り替えることを許してください。それは、限られた言葉では表現できない我々の敬意をより正確に伝えるでしょう。」{n}ビナハリックの鳥のさえずりが甲板に響き渡り、思考装置の唸り声と融合する。{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the Omnissiah bless the Lord Captain for this audience under Protocol 32/3! The Sacred Tech-Procession has come here reciting chant of gratitude 200-Alpha. We will sing of the Sector Bionica's concern for those who have forsaken the flesh in the service of the ship's Machine Spirit. The voices of our augments will sing the praises of your piety throughout the decks of the ship. Give us leave to switch to the sacred Techna-Lingua, which will convey our admiration more accurately than limited words." {n}Binharic trills ring out across the deck, melding with the hum of the cogitators.{/n}

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih{/g}, bu onaylı görüşme için Lord Kaptan'ı kutsasın! Bu tekno kafile, buraya şükran ilahilerini okumaya geldi. Makine ruhunun hizmetinde etinden vazgeçenler için Lord Kaptan'ın endişesini haykıralım. Metal sesleri, geminin güvertelerinde takvanıza övgüler düzecek. Hayranlığımızı sınırlı kelimelerden daha doğru bir şekilde iletecek olan kutsal {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Techna{/g}'ya geçmemize izin verin." {n}İkilidilde şakımalar, güvertede yankılanarak {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayarların{/g} uğultusuna karışıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} bless the Lord Captain for this sanctioned audience! This tech-procession has come reciting the canticles of gratitude. Let us sing of the Lord Captain's concern for those who have forsaken their flesh in the service of the machine spirit! The voices of metal will sing the praises of your piety throughout the decks of the ship. Give us leave to switch to the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Techna-Lingua{/g}, which will convey our admiration more accurately than limited words." {n}Binharic trills ring out across the deck, melding with the hum of the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}.{/n}

Makine ruhunun hizmetinde etinden vazgeçenler için Lord Kaptan'ın endişesini haykıralım. Metal sesleri, geminin güvertelerinde takvanıza övgüler düzecek. Hayranlığımızı sınırlı kelimelerden daha doğru bir şekilde iletecek olan kutsal {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Techna{/g}'ya geçmemize izin verin." {n}İkilidilde şakımalar, güvertede yankılanarak {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayarların{/g} uğultusuna karışıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “愿{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}赐福此次觐见！神圣技术队列已入场，吟诵感恩颂歌。我们将歌颂行商浪人对那些为侍奉机魂而舍弃血肉者的关怀。金属的和鸣将在全舰每一层甲板上传颂您的虔诚。恳请允许我们切换至{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}科技之语{/g}——这种语言比凡俗言辞更能精确传达我们的崇敬。”{n}二进制颤音如潮水般漫过甲板，与{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}的低吟交织相融。{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} bless the Lord Captain for this sanctioned audience! This tech-procession has come reciting the canticles of gratitude. Let us sing of the Lord Captain's concern for those who have forsaken their flesh in the service of the machine spirit! The voices of metal will sing the praises of your piety throughout the decks of the ship. Give us leave to switch to the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Techna-Lingua{/g}, which will convey our admiration more accurately than limited words." {n}Binharic trills ring out across the deck, melding with the hum of the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: "Möge der {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} den Lord Captain für diese sanktionierte Audienz segnen! Diese Tech-Prozession ist hier, um die Lobgesänge der Dankbarkeit anzustimmen. Wir werden von der Sorge des Lord Captains um jene singen, die ihrem Fleisch im Dienst des Maschinengeistes entsagt haben! Die metallenen Stimmen werden Eure Frömmigkeit auf allen Decks des Schiffes preisen. Gestattet uns nun, zur heiligen {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua technis{/g} zu wechseln, die unserer Bewunderung präziser Ausdruck verleiht als bloße Worte." {n}Ein binhärisches Trillern hallt über das Deck und verschmilzt mit dem Summen der {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitatoren{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} bless the Lord Captain for this sanctioned audience! languages.text: « L'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} bénisse {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} pour cette audience approuvée ! Cette technoprocession se présente devant vous pour réciter les cantiques de gratitude. Ce faisant, nous louerons les bons soins {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} envers ceux qui ont sacrifié leur chair au service de l'esprit de la machine ! Sur tous les ponts du vaisseau, les voix de métal s'apprêtent à rendre hommage à votre piété. Avec votre permission, nous emploierons le {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}langage technique{/g} sacré, mieux à même d'exprimer notre admiration que les vocables par trop limités de la langue commune. » {n}Des trilles binhaires s'élèvent aux quatre coins du pont et viennent se mêler au ronronnement des {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateurs{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: "May the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} bless the Lord Captain for this sanctioned audience! This tech-procession has come reciting the canticles of gratitude. Let us sing of the Lord Captain's concern for those who have forsaken their flesh in the service of the machine spirit! The voices of metal will sing the praises of your piety throughout the decks of the ship. Give us leave to switch to the sacred {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Techna-Lingua{/g}, which will convey our admiration more accurately than limited words." {n}Binharic trills ring out across the deck, melding with the hum of the {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitators{/g}.{/n}

Cette technoprocession se présente devant vous pour réciter les cantiques de gratitude. Ce faisant, nous louerons les bons soins {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine} envers ceux qui ont sacrifié leur chair au service de l'esprit de la machine ! Sur tous les ponts du vaisseau, les voix de métal s'apprêtent à rendre hommage à votre piété. Avec votre permission, nous emploierons le {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}langage technique{/g} sacré, mieux à même d'exprimer notre admiration que les vocables par trop limités de la langue commune. » {n}Des trilles binhaires s'élèvent aux quatre coins du pont et viennent se mêler au ronronnement des {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateurs{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Que el {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} bendiga a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán por concedernos esta audiencia! La sagrada tecnoprocesión viene entonando el cántico de gratitud. ¡Cantaremos a la preocupación de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán por quienes han renunciado a la carne para servir al espíritu máquina! Las voces de metal proclamarán alabanzas a su piedad por las cubiertas de la nave. Permítanos pasar a la sagrada {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}tecnolingua{/g}, que transmitirá nuestra admiración con más precisión que el limitado vocabulario». {n}Unos trinos binarios recorren la cubierta, fundiéndose con el zumbido de los {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitadores{/g}.{/n}
